text.tspan: Rotate the Stripe secret key immediately. Use env vars only.
A04 Cryptographic Failures, A07 Authentication Failures
Rotate in Supabase dashboard. Never expose in client code.
SQL Injection via Raw Query String
db.query("SELECT * FROM orders WHERE user = '" + userId + "'")
Use parameterized queries or an ORM like Prisma.
Sanitize with DOMPurify before rendering user-generated HTML.
Rotate the Stripe secret key immediately. Use env vars only.
Rotate the Supabase service role key. Use the anon key for frontend.
Use parameterized queries for all database operations.
